1me9t7c.en: Smart agricultural trade SAAS management platform

tqzv9r2j.zh-cn: 该平台是专门做智慧农贸信息化平台,食品安全追溯平台,该平台集合了大数据屏,商户数据,商户菜品,交易订单数据,管理人员, 农贸市场监控的对接;目前该平台已经有近1000家农贸市场入驻;
tqzv9r2j.en: This platform is specifically designed as an information platform for smart agricultural trade and a food safety traceability platform. It integrates the connection of big data screens, merchant data, merchant dishes, transaction order data, management personnel, and agricultural market monitoring. At present, nearly 1,000 farmers' markets have settled in this platform.

nonyovg.zh-cn: 农贸市场综合监管平台/监管小程序
nonyovg.en: Comprehensive supervision platform for farmers' markets/Supervision mini-program

2kuec539.zh-cn: 该平台是配套农贸市场端平台和小程序端一起使用的,可以看到市区下的所有农贸市场当日交易,客流已经发布农贸市场整改任 务;可以控制单个或多个农贸市场人员的权限菜单和使用;商户可以使用该小程序进行物业缴费,会员卡开卡,微信支付充卡等功能;;
2kuec539.en: This platform is used in conjunction with the end platform of the farmers' market and the mini-program end. It enables users to view the daily transactions and customer flow of all farmers' markets in the urban area. The rectification tasks of the farmers' markets have been released. It can control the permission menu and usage of personnel in one or more farmers' markets. Merchants can use this mini-program for functions such as property management fees, opening membership cards, and recharging wechat Pay cards.

k0zyh3d.zh-cn: 该小程序是针对市场开发,可以让商户查看自己所属的摊位有哪些,经营范围有哪些,自己的商户评级,查看进货凭证,缴费,交易明 细,称具管理,菜品优惠,账单等功能,可以让市场查看商户的点评,商户的信息,商户屏的状态,日常巡检,商户考核发布公告等功能;
k0zyh3d.en: This mini-program is developed for the market, allowing merchants to check which stalls they own, what their business scope is, their merchant ratings, view purchase vouchers, make payments, and transaction records It is detailed and has functions such as management, dish discounts, and billing. It enables the market to view merchants' reviews, information, screen status, daily inspections, and announcements for merchant evaluations.

wcxz88f.zh-cn: 环强再生资源平台+用户端小程序
wcxz88f.en: Huanqiang Recycling Resources Platform + User-end mini-program

arjayu4b.zh-cn: 环强再生资源平台是针对垃圾回收开发的一款产品,主要功能是,用户使用环强再生小程序提交选择垃圾类型,时间和物品照片, 添加自己的信息地址和电话,提交上去后,后台管理人员使用环强再生资源平台对该提交的信息进行审核,和车辆选择以及下发给 司机,司机端 app 收到消息后去用户家中取垃圾后再进行差价返还; 平台同上;
arjayu4b.en: The Huanqiang Recycling Resources Platform is a product developed specifically for garbage recycling. Its main function is that users can submit the selection of garbage type, time and item photos through the Huanqiang Recycling mini-program. Add your own information address and phone number. After submitting it, the back-end management personnel will use the Huanqiang Recycling Resources Platform to review the submitted information, select the vehicle and send it to the driver. After receiving the message, the driver's app will go to the user's home to pick up the garbage and then refund the price difference. The platform is the same as above.

rp88xqm.zh-cn: 萧山国有农贸市场智慧大数据驾驶舱(大数据屏)
rp88xqm.en: Xiaoshan State-owned Farmers' Market Smart Big Data Cockpit (Big Data Screen)

rlhm6u4k.zh-cn: 萧山国有农贸市场智慧大数据是针对杭州市萧山区下的农贸市场进行一个整合和直观数据的查看,可以非常直观的看到萧山农 贸市场下的每个农贸市场的客流,市场的图片,每日市场销售的排行榜,日/月销售的占比,和每个市场今日菜价的波动,24小时统 计,交易年走势,市场的考核,和热销的商品有哪些,还有商品溯源的信息等..全部轮博展示在大屏上;;
rlhm6u4k.en: The smart big data of Xiaoshan State-owned Farmers' Markets is an integrated and intuitive data viewing system for the farmers' markets under Xiaoshan District, Hangzhou City. It enables a very intuitive view of the customer flow, market pictures, daily sales rankings, daily/monthly sales proportions, and the fluctuations in vegetable prices of each market today, with 24-hour statistics Calculate the trend of the trading year, market assessment, what are the best-selling products, and information on product traceability, etc. All the wheels are displayed on the large screen.

vydqx22c.en: Display all the farmers' markets under Quzhou City.
